title: Qiskit Textbook - VQE
text: Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) is a hybrid algorithm that estimates the ground state energy of a Hamiltonian using a parameterized quantum circuit (ansatz) and a classical optimizer. The cost function is the expectation value of the Hamiltonian with respect to the ansatz state.

title: PennyLane - State Tomography
text: Quantum state tomography reconstructs the density matrix of a quantum state by measuring in informationally complete bases and applying a reconstruction method such as linear inversion or maximum likelihood estimation.

title: Cirq - QAOA Examples
text: The Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) alternates between applying a cost unitary based on a problem Hamiltonian and a mixer unitary. Parameters are optimized to maximize the objective function (e.g., MaxCut).
